op.text: Resolved 2025-05-11: Staying in Portland. Sam negotiated remote work arrangement with Austin robotics startup (Perception team lead role); will work from Portland with occasional travel to Austin (approximately one week every couple months); starts June 2025. Sam's offer accepted by company. Dana described relief at not having to leave 'load-bearing geography' this year.

Sam accepted Perception team lead role at robotics startup in Austin, Texas, with remote work arrangement from Portland; starts June 2025; will travel to Austin approximately one week every couple months
[as of 2025-05-11] Out of walking boot; attending physical therapy twice weekly; walking normally-ish; ankle recovering

2025-05-11: On Sam's remote work arrangement being approved: 'When he told me they'd agreed, I cried a little, which surprised me. I hadn't let myself feel how scared I was of leaving this year — the barn, the boat, Beacon Rock, all of it. And I'd been quietly rehearsing how to be graceful about going. Not needing the rehearsal anymore was the relief.' (2025-05-11)
[as of 2025-05-11] Boat restoration progress: starboard side sanded, started re-caulking hull seams on the Dorothy Jean

op.note: Session 2025-05-11: Dana notes Nina is two months old and she still hasn't visited Denver; says it's 'starting to itch at me' — awareness of unfulfilled intention but no concrete plan yet
